question:
Will Red Bull Bragantino win on 2025-11-05?

Description: In the upcoming game, scheduled for November 5, 2025
If Red Bull Bragantino wins, this market will resolve to "Yes".
Otherwise, this market will resolve to "No".
If the game is postponed, this market will remain open until the game has been completed.
If the game is canceled entirely, with no make-up game, this market will resolve "No".
This market refers only to the outcome within the first 90 minutes of regular play plus stoppage time.

Resolution source: https://www.cbf.com.br/futebol-brasileiro/competicoes/campeonato-brasileiro-serie-a

evidences.title: Pinnacle: Online Sports Betting | The Best Odds
evidences.content: ### Odds Calculator: Converting and Analyzing Odds The Odds Calculator is an essential tool for any serious player. It allows you to convert odds between different formats (decimal, fractional, and American) and calculate the implied probability of an event. This helps you determine whether the odds offered by Pinnacle represent good value based on your own analysis. For instance, if you’re evaluating a bet with odds of +175, the Odds Calculator shows that the implied probability is 36.4% (100/(100+175)). If your research suggests a 40% probability, the bet offers positive expected value. ### Arbitrage Calculator: Securing Guaranteed Profits [...] For example, if the odds of a team winning the Super Bowl are +600, the implied probability is 14.3%, calculated as 100/(100+600). If your research indicates that the team has a 20% chance of winning, then betting on them at Pinnacle’s odds provides a statistically favorable edge. ### Hockey betting: A Nation’s Passion Hockey is deeply ingrained in Canada’s culture, and it’s no surprise that it’s one of the most popular sports to bet on at Pinnacle. evidences.title: Red - Wikipedia
evidences.content: The color is commonly used for professional sports teams in Canada and the United States with eleven Major League Baseball teams, eleven National Hockey League teams, seven National Football League teams and eleven National Basketball Association teams prominently featuring some shade of the color. The color is also featured in the league logos of Major League Baseball, the National Football League and the National Basketball Association. In the National Football League, a red flag is thrown by the head coach to challenge a referee's decision during the game. During the 1950s when red was strongly associated with communism in the United States, the modern Cincinnati Reds team was known as the "Redlegs" and the term was used on baseball cards. After the red scare faded, the team was known [...] In club association football (soccer), red is a commonly used color throughout the world. Among European notable club teams most often playing at home in red shirts include Bayern Munich, Benfica, Liverpool, Manchester United and Roma. Furthermore, many prominent teams play in partially red color schemes, involving different-colored sleeves or stripes. A number of teams' nicknames feature...
